seo.title: JKT48Connect vs JKT48 Official Website - API Access for Developers
seo.description: Compare JKT48Connect and the JKT48 Official Website. JKT48Connect provides a structured REST API for developers to access member data, live streams, theater schedules, and events programmatically.

hero.heading: JKT48Connect vs JKT48 Official Website
hero.subheading: The JKT48 Official Website is great for fans — but it has no developer API. JKT48Connect gives developers programmatic access to the same data through a stable REST API with TypeScript SDK, webhooks, and real-time stream tracking.

competitor.name: JKT48 Official Website
competitor.short_description: The official JKT48 web app and website providing news, member profiles, theater schedules, and merchandise for fans.

overview.title: Why use JKT48Connect instead of the official website?
paragraphs: The JKT48 Official Website is the go-to destination for fans — it has member profiles, theater schedules, news, and merchandise. But it's built for fans to consume content, not for developers to build applications. There is no public API, no documented endpoints, and no way to access the data programmatically without scraping.

JKT48Connect is built specifically for developers. Every data type available in the official website — and more — is accessible through clean, documented REST endpoints with consistent schemas, versioning, and a TypeScript SDK. You don't need to scrape, you don't need to maintain HTML parsers, and you don't need to worry about bot detection.

Beyond what the official website offers, JKT48Connect adds capabilities that are fundamentally impossible through the official website: real-time IDN Live and Showroom viewer counts, webhook notifications when members go live, cross-platform stream aggregation, and historical stream analytics including chat logs and gift data.
If you want to build a JKT48 fansite, Discord bot, birthday tracker, or web app, the official website gives you nothing to work with programmatically. JKT48Connect gives you everything.

summary_comparison.title: JKT48Connect vs JKT48 Official Website: Which is right for you?
summary_comparison.intro: The official website is for fans consuming content. JKT48Connect is for developers building applications.
summary_comparison.one_liner: The JKT48 Official Website has no developer API; JKT48Connect is a REST API built specifically for developers who want to build JKT48 apps.
best_for_openpanel: Developers building JKT48 fansites or fan apps
Teams needing real-time live stream viewer counts
Apps requiring webhook notifications when members go live
Developers who want normalized, consistent data schemas
best_for_competitor: Fans who want to browse JKT48 content casually
Users who want the official, curated JKT48 experience
Merchandise and ticket purchases through official channels
Fans who don't need to build anything programmatically

highlights.title: Key differences at a glance
highlights.intro: Here's how JKT48Connect and the JKT48 Official Website compare on developer-relevant factors.

items.label: Developer API
items.openpanel: Full REST API with TypeScript SDK
items.notes: The official website has no documented API. JKT48Connect is built as a developer-first API platform.

items.label: Real-time live stream data
items.openpanel: Yes — IDN Live, Showroom, YouTube viewer counts
items.competitor: No — only displayed on the website, not accessible programmatically
items.notes: JKT48Connect aggregates live stream data from all platforms in real-time. The official website shows this on the website but provides no API access.

items.label: Webhook notifications
items.openpanel: Yes — instant push notifications for live events
items.competitor: No — push notifications only to the official website
items.notes: JKT48Connect webhooks let you build your own notification systems. The official website only sends push notifications to its own users.

items.label: Data format
items.openpanel: Normalized JSON with consistent schemas and member IDs
items.notes: JKT48Connect returns structured, normalized JSON with consistent member_id across all endpoints. The official website only displays data visually.

items.label: Cross-platform aggregation
items.openpanel: IDN Live + Showroom + YouTube in one API
items.notes: JKT48Connect aggregates data from multiple platforms. The official website may show some of this, but none of it is API-accessible.

items.label: Pricing
items.openpanel: Free tier available, Pro from Rp 49.000/month
items.notes: The official website is free for fans. JKT48Connect has a free developer tier and paid plans for higher API usage.

technical_comparison.title: Technical comparison
technical_comparison.intro: For developers, here's what the integration looks like in practice.

pricing.title: Pricing comparison
pricing.intro: The official website is free for fans. JKT48Connect has a free developer tier and paid plans for higher usage.

openpanel.description: Free tier: 1.000 API calls/month, no credit card required. Pro: Rp 49.000/month (~$3) for 100.000 calls. Enterprise: custom pricing for unlimited usage. All features included at every tier.

competitor.description: The JKT48 Official Website is free for fans to use. There is no developer pricing because there is no developer API. If you want JKT48 data for building apps, you need JKT48Connect.
competitor.free_tier: Free for fans, not applicable for developers

use_cases.intro: Everything the official website shows — and more — available programmatically for building fan applications.

items.title: Discord & Telegram Bots
items.description: Create bots that announce when members go live, share daily theater schedules, post birthday messages, and summarize JKT48 news — using JKT48Connect webhooks and API endpoints.

items.title: Mobile Fan Apps
items.description: Build web or mobile fan apps with real-time live stream tracking, personalized member profiles, and push notifications for upcoming shows — features the official website doesn't expose to third-party developers.

items.title: Birthday & Schedule Trackers
items.description: Build dedicated birthday reminder apps and theater schedule trackers using JKT48Connect's Birthday API and Theater endpoints — with data that stays accurate without manual maintenance.

items.title: Live Stream Analytics
items.description: Build viewer count leaderboards, streaming activity trackers, and oshi support dashboards using real-time IDN Live and Showroom data — completely unavailable through the official website.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.intro: Common questions from developers comparing JKT48Connect with the official website.

items.question: Does JKT48 have an official API for developers?
items.answer: No. JKT48 does not provide a public API for developers. The official website and website are designed for fan consumption only. JKT48Connect is an independent API service that aggregates JKT48 data and delivers it through a developer-friendly REST API.

items.question: Is JKT48Connect affiliated with JKT48?
items.answer: No. JKT48Connect is an independent developer project, not affiliated with JKT48 or its management. JKT48Connect aggregates publicly available information about JKT48 and provides it through a structured API for fan developers.

items.question: Does JKT48Connect have the same data as the official website?
items.answer: JKT48Connect covers most of the same data categories as the official website — member profiles, theater schedules, events, and news — plus additional data not available in the official website, such as real-time IDN Live and Showroom viewer counts, stream history, and cross-platform live stream aggregation.

items.question: Can I build a commercial app using JKT48Connect?
items.answer: Yes. Commercial use is supported on Pro and Enterprise plans. Keep in mind that JKT48 member names, images, and related content belong to their respective owners. JKT48Connect provides data infrastructure; you are responsible for ensuring your application complies with relevant terms of service and intellectual property considerations.

items.question: Why can't I just scrape the official JKT48 app?
items.answer: Scraping the official website is technically difficult (it uses website APIs, not web pages) and may violate JKT48's terms of service. JKT48Connect provides a legal, stable, and maintained alternative that doesn't require scraping.

items.question: How accurate is JKT48Connect's data compared to official sources?
items.answer: JKT48Connect aggregates data from official JKT48 sources and updates continuously. Member data, theater schedules, and events are sourced from official announcements. Live stream data is aggregated directly from IDN Live and Showroom in real-time.

items.question: What data does JKT48Connect have that the official website doesn't show?
items.answer: JKT48Connect provides data not visible in the official website: real-time IDN Live and Showroom viewer counts, stream history with duration and peak viewer data, chat logs and gift data from individual streams, cross-platform stream aggregation, and webhook notifications for developer use cases.

items.question: Is there a free tier for developers?
items.answer: Yes. JKT48Connect offers 1.000 API calls/month free with no credit card required — enough to prototype and test your fan app. Non-commercial fan projects can also apply to the Developer Program for extended free access.

articles.title: Why not to scrape JKT48 data
